name: Primineral Kongreat
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>礫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>岩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－コングレード
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by a card effect. If a monster is sent from your opponent's hand or Deck to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand in face-down Defense Position. If this card is flipped face-up: You can target up to 2 cards on the field; destroy them.

If this card is flipped face-up: You can target up to 2 cards on the field; destroy them.
